purpose: Screen non-focusing basal-interface trends that preserve a laterally continuous reflection band without a centred bowl, apex, or point-target-like response.
supersedes: none; SHAPE02 remains immutable historical screening evidence

locked.cover_index_field: one shared deterministic field and hash for every shape
locked.material_table: one shared table and hash for every shape

canonical_release.shared_air_reference: required once before release when acquisition and source hashes are identical

shape_bank.description: Long monotonic regional dip with no interior high, low, or reflection-path convergence.
Monotonic regional trend with a distributed asymmetric change in slope, not a local basin.
Long, monotonic shelf transition with bounded curvature and no pair of converging flanks.

geometry_gates.quadratic_rejection: Nonfocusing profiles may be approximately linear; their required no-internal-extremum rule replaces the SHAPE02 quadratic rejection.

execution_stages.gate: bounded depth, slope, no internal extrema, full-aperture visual review
signed residual localized near expected basal arrival

execution_stages.run: 16 traces at native indices 0,17,...,255 for full/control
execution_stages.gate: full-aperture morphology without a focal apex
501x256 export plus human blind morphology decision
